input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.6.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.6.1.4
            TITLE: lines and fittings - the gas lines and fittings must be appropriate for the maximum possible

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.4: Lines and Fittings - The gas lines and fittings must be appropriate for the maximum possible
T.6.1.4 Lines and Fittings - The gas lines and fittings must be appropriate for the maximum possible 
operating pressure of the system.

final_answer: Lines and Fittings - The gas lines and fittings must be appropriate for the maximum possible operating pressure of the system.
